title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 17 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 17 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 17 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 17/06/2024
DCE iron ore futures open higher and go lower， falling trends in the day， the main contract closed 813，an decreaseof 1.63% throughout the day; Some traders are closed and unable to ship, while others have average enthusiasm for shipping；Some steel procurement more cautious, the continuation of a small number of multi-frequency procurement strategy . PBF at Shandong port dealt 810 yuan/mt; decreased 7-20 yuan/mt from last Friday. PBF at Tangshan port dealt 825-830 yuan/mt; decreased 10-15 yuan/mt from last Friday.
